name: Audio Trip
short_description: Dance to your favorite music (and workout in “Cardio”) as you catch gems, ride ribbons, smash drums, & dodge barriers. With tracks by Zedd, Lady Gaga, Skrillex, deadmau5, Tiësto, express yourself & get creative with the in-VR editor--with support for your own songs!
detailed_description:
Audio Trip is a VR rhythm game where you dance to your favorite music (and workout in ‘Cardio’ levels) as you catch ‘gems’, ride ‘ribbons’, smash drums, & dodge barriers and MOVE YOUR BODY in 120 levels across 32 songs, plus support for your own songs and custom choreographies.

Express the dancer and fitness fanatic within you!

Make it YOUR “Audio Trip” by using the in-VR level editor to create custom choreographies with your own unique dance moves, with the same tool used by the developers to create their choreography!

Join our community to learn more and to showcase your flair! [Discord: ]

Main Features:
  • Licensed music by top artists: Skrillex, Zedd, deadmau5, Lady Gaga, Tiësto, Psy... and more!
  • In-VR level editor (‘Choreographer’ tool) included.
  • BEGINNER, REGULAR, and EXPERT difficulties plus CARDIO levels for every song.
  • ‘Full Trip’ or ‘Short Trip’ options for each song.
  • Fully immersive and hand-crafted environments for each song.
  • Intuitive UI with a simple tutorial for your first time playing.
  • PLAYLISTS allow you to play through one of our lists of songs or create your own from any songs in the game, plus any of your own songs, for non-stop dance & workout regimes.
  • Gameplay customization: ‘Comfort’, ‘Dancer’, ‘No Fail’, custom colors, ‘Scenery Only mode’, and more.
  • Global and Local (Party Mode) Leaderboards to challenge your friends!
  • Campaign Mode with Achievements and Modifiers –Get rewarded with shiny badges while you progress through YOUR Audio Trip - And see them on display in the Dance Dojo!

    “Movement is a medicine for creating change in a person’s physical, emotional, and mental states.” – Carol Welch

    Choose your song & difficulty, then hit the LAUNCH button!


    Match your hands to the choreography, move to the music, and D A N C E


    Create your own choreography, or edit any of ours, with our in-VR editor!


    And don't forget to toggle on your virtual YUR watch to track your fitness and join in on the weekly Calories and Squats leaderboards while playing Audio Trip!
